title: × Hadrocattleya elegans
taxonomy: × Hadrocattleya elegans is a hybrid orchid species, classified within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The species × Hadrocattleya elegans is a cross between Hadrocattleya and Cattleya orchid genera. However, due to its hybrid nature, the exact classification can be complex and may be subject to change. The classification of × Hadrocattleya elegans is further divided into various subcategories based on its characteristics and parentage.
